channel.title: Microsoft Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Microsoft Corporation (microsoft).

item.title: CVE-2026-50659 · 6.5 MEDIUM — .NET Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Improper encoding or escaping of output in .NET allows an authorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-50651 · 7.5 HIGH — .NET Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Allocation of resources without limits or throttling in .NET allows an unauthorized attacker to deny service over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-50650 · 7.8 HIGH — .NET Framework Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper control of generation of code ('code injection') in .NET Framework allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-50649 · 7.8 HIGH — .NET Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Deserialization of untrusted data in .NET allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-50648 · 7.5 HIGH — .NET Framework Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Allocation of resources without limits or throttling in .NET Framework allows an unauthorized attacker to deny service over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-50646 · 7.8 HIGH — .NET Framework Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Protection mechanism failure in .NET Framework allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-50528 · 8.2 HIGH — .NET Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Incorrect authorization in .NET allows an unauthorized attacker to bypass a security feature over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-50527 · 7.5 HIGH — .NET Framework Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow in .NET Framework allows an unauthorized attacker to deny service over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-50526 · 7 HIGH — .NET Tampering Vulnerability
item.description: Improper link resolution before file access ('link following') in .NET allows an authorized attacker to perform tampering locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-50525 · 7.5 HIGH — .NET Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Allocation of resources without limits or throttling in .NET allows an unauthorized attacker to deny service over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-50524 · 7.5 HIGH — .NET Framework Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Improper validation of specified type of input in .NET Framework allows an unauthorized attacker to deny service over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-47305 · 7.8 HIGH — Visual Studio Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Protection mechanism failure in Visual Studio allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-47304 · 8.1 HIGH — .NET Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Improper verification of cryptographic signature in .NET allows an unauthorized attacker to bypass a security feature over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-47303 · 8.8 HIGH — ASP.NET Core Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Authentication bypass by assumed-immutable data in ASP.NET Core allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-47302 · 7.5 HIGH — .NET Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Allocation of resources without limits or throttling in .NET allows an unauthorized attacker to deny service over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-47301 · 8.8 HIGH — Configuration Manager Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Microsoft Configuration Manager allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-47300 · 8.8 HIGH — ASP.NET Core Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Incorrect implementation of authentication algorithm in ASP.NET Core allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58529 · 7.1 HIGH — Windows Active Directory Federation Services (ADFS) Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Out-of-bounds read in Active Directory Federation Services (AD FS) allows an authorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-55121 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Microsoft Office Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Out-of-bounds read in Microsoft Office allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-56181 · 8.3 HIGH — Windows Network Address Translation (NAT) Spoofing Vulnerability
item.description: Origin validation error in Windows Network Address Translation (NAT) allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over an adjacent network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58638 · 6 MEDIUM — Windows Boot Loader Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Missing cryptographic step in Windows Boot Loader allows an authorized attacker to bypass a security feature locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58637 · 7 HIGH — Windows Client-Side Caching Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Client-Side Caching (CSC) Service allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58634 · 7.8 HIGH — Desktop Window Manager Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Desktop Window Manager allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58633 · 7.8 HIGH — Desktop Window Manager Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Desktop Window Manager allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58632 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Win32 Kernel Subsystem Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Win32K allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58629 · 7 HIGH — DirectX Graphics Kernel Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows DirectX allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58628 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Wireless Network Manager Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Concurrent execution using shared resource with improper synchronization ('race condition') in Windows Wireless Networking allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58627 · 7.5 HIGH — Windows DHCP Server Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Uncontrolled resource consumption in Windows DHCP Server allows an unauthorized attacker to deny service over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58626 · 8.8 HIGH — Windows Remote Desktop Services Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Remote Desktop Services allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58619 · 7 HIGH — Windows Sensor Data Service Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Sensor Data Service allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58617 · 8.1 HIGH — M365 Copilot for iOS Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Microsoft 365 Copilot for iOS allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58613 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Cloud Files Mini Filter Driver Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Cloud Files Mini Filter Driver allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58594 · 8.8 HIGH — Remote Desktop Client Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Integer overflow or wraparound in Windows RDP allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58541 · 7.8 HIGH — Microsoft DWM Core Library Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Access of resource using incompatible type ('type confusion') in Windows DWM allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58543 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Universal Print Management Service Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Concurrent execution using shared resource with improper synchronization ('race condition') in Windows USB Print Driver allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges with a physical attack.

item.title: CVE-2026-58542 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Media Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Windows Media allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58544 · 7 HIGH — Windows Management Services Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Management Services allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58545 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Windows Kernel Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: Improper access control in Windows Kernel allows an authorized attacker to bypass a security feature locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58547 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Windows Universal Plug and Play (UPnP) Device Host Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Universal Plug and Play (upnp.dll) allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58536 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Cloud Files Mini Filter Driver Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Cloud Files Mini Filter Driver allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58534 · 8.8 HIGH — Windows Input Method Editor (IME) Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Microsoft Input Method Editor (IME) allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58537 · 7.8 HIGH — Microsoft NAT Helper Components (ipnathlp.dll) Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft NAT Helper Components (ipnathlp.dll) allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58532 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Kernel Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Integer overflow or wraparound in Windows Kernel allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58531 · 7.5 HIGH — Windows SMB Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Concurrent execution using shared resource with improper synchronization ('race condition') in Windows SMB allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58540 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Installer Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper authorization in Windows Installer allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-58539 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Windows Remote Desktop Client Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Out-of-bounds read in Windows RDP allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58546 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Windows Remote Desktop Client Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Use of uninitialized resource in Windows RDP allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58535 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Windows Remote Desktop Client Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Use of uninitialized resource in Windows RDP allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58533 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Windows Remote Desktop Client Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Use of uninitialized resource in Windows RDP allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-58538 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Bluetooth Service Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Windows Bluetooth Service allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.
